name: Pediococcus acidilactici PA53
summary: Strain-defined probiotic intervention tested in a randomized older-adult trial for emotional well-being, gastrointestinal symptoms, sleep quality, inflammatory biomarkers, and microbiota composition.
mechanism_summary: Uses a live Pediococcus strain to modulate gut microbiota composition and gut-brain or inflammatory signaling in older adults.

open_questions: Whether short-term well-being, sleep, and gut-symptom improvements replicate independently
Whether microbiota and inflammatory changes are durable after discontinuation
Whether the signal generalizes to frailty, intrinsic capacity, disease progression, or other aging-relevant functional outcomes
